title: Hiring Software Engineer at NoBroker Global Group

jsonLd.title: Hiring Software Engineer at NoBroker Global Group
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at NoBroker Global Group. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Software Engineer to strengthen our Nashik-based team.

About NoBroker Global Group:
NoBroker Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NoBroker Global Group!
